nasb.text: Whoever hits you on the cheek, offer him the other also; and whoever takes away your coat, do not withhold your shirt from him either.

esv.text: To one who strikes you on the cheek, offer the other also, and from one who takes away your cloak do not withhold your tunic  either.

cnv.text: 有人打你一邊的臉，把另一邊也轉給他打；有人拿你的外衣，連內衣也讓他拿去。

ccb.text: 如果有人打你一边的脸，连另一边也转过来让他打。如果有人夺你的外衣，连内衣也由他拿去。

csbs.text: 有人打你这边的脸，把另一边也让他打；有人拿走你的外衣，连里衣也不要阻止他拿；
